name: Marsh Captive Solutions
description: As the world's largest captive manager, Marsh manages over 1,200 captives globally, offering bespoke structuring, feasibility analysis, and full-scale regulatory administrative services.

name: Milliman
description: Milliman is a premier global actuarial consulting firm, providing claims reserve modeling, feasibility projections, and regulatory actuarial opinions for corporate self-insurance entities.

name: Strategic Risk Solutions (SRS)
description: SRS is the world's leading independent captive management firm, providing specialized formation and ongoing management services across all major onshore and offshore domiciles.

name: Test Captive Services
description: A leading independent manager based in Toronto, Canada providing premium captives support.

name: Zurich North America Fronting
description: Zurich provides leading admitted fronting capabilities across Canada and the United States, issuing local compliant policies backed by captive reinsurance structures.
